case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ROBERTO PITA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PITA, ROBERTO $1,270.60 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,495.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PITA, ROBERTO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PITA, ROBERTO
DECLARATION CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUL-10-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-26-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PITA, ROBERTO
DECLARATION OF PLTF'S COUNSEL RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-10-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $60.22 INTEREST, $46.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PITA, ROBERTO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-11-2011
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT PITA, ROBERTO
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-13-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PITA, ROBERTO
